overview: Based on the published agenda, the Police and Fire Commission of Kronenwetter was scheduled to meet to consider employment matters for Fire Department applicants, review personnel procedures, and approve previous meeting minutes. The meeting was set to include closed session discussions regarding personnel and employment evaluations.

agenda.item: Closed Session - Consideration of employment, promotion, compensation or performance evaluation data and disciplinary matters
Discussion and possible action after review of Charge Form and Procedures

discussions.body: The Commission was scheduled to approve the minutes from the June 22, 2026 meeting.

The Commission was set to convene in closed session to interview Fire Department applicant(s) and consider related employment matters pursuant to state statute provisions protecting personnel information.
The Commission was scheduled to discuss and consider possible action following a review of the Charge Form and Procedures, with this discussion occurring after the closed session concluded.

publicComment: Public comment was indicated on the agenda with a 15-minute total period and three-minute per-person limit, at the discretion of the Chief Presiding Officer.
actionItems: Set to interview Fire Department applicant(s) in closed session
Expected to consider possible action on Charge Form and Procedures
title: Police and Fire Commission Meeting - 2026-07-13
